name: Dikshant International School - Zirakpur

itemListElement.reviewBody: All reviews are fake and parents are pushed to write feedback about the school where they are left with no choice but to write a review which pleases the school. The school management is the worst. No one hears the complaint or concern once the kids are admitted.
Management is not good . They don't responds to parents concerns . Deaf ears on concerns . Principal of this school is like a VIP who doesn't talk to parents .

Dikshant International School exceeds expectations! Dedicated teachers, excellent academics, and a nurturing environment. Our Kid loves learning here. School gives great emphasis on character development. We Highly recommend the school for kid's over all growth and all round development.

Dikshant has been a second home for my child.
Children are given many opportunities for building their confidence, and various activities and sports are there for them to develop an area of interest.
The teachers are very supportive and not only teach subjects but also about various aspects of character development.
Overall, I would always recommend the school for parents who want holistic development of their children.

Dikshant school is very good and the staff is responsive.When it was my day of how the teachers and the students will be ,but it was so easy for to mix with them the teachers are very supportive and the students are very friendly.To be honest the school helped me to boost my confidence and the school organises various festivals ,competitions . I will highly recommend this school.

Dikshant International School is a prominent educational institution known for its commitment to providing high-quality education. Situated in a modern, well-equipped campus, the school offers a comprehensive curriculum that blends academic excellence with extracurricular opportunities.

One of the highlights of Dikshant International School is its emphasis on holistic development. The school provides students with a well-rounded education, focusing not only on academics but also on physical fitness, creativity, and life skills. With state-of-the-art infrastructure, including science labs, sports facilities, and a library, students are encouraged to explore their interests beyond traditional subjects.

The teaching staff is highly qualified and experienced, with a student-teacher ratio that allows for individualized attention. The curriculum is designed to challenge students while fostering critical thinking, problem-solving, and a global outlook. Additionally, the school encourages active participation in international exchange programs, workshops, and competitions, broadening the exposure of its students to diverse cultures and ideas.

Parents have expressed satisfaction with the school's management, communication, and responsiveness to concerns. The school's leadership is dedicated to maintaining a nurturing and safe environment for students, fostering a sense of community, and supporting the overall well-being of each child.

However, as with any institution, there are areas for improvement. Some parents have suggested enhancing the school's digital learning infrastructure to match the growing demand for tech-enabled education. Additionally, a few have raised concerns about the cost, as the fees can be on the higher side, particularly for families seeking more affordable options.

Overall, Dikshant International School offers a well-rounded education with a focus on both academic and personal growth. Its modern facilities, dedicated faculty, and commitment to nurturing young minds make it a solid choice for parents looking for a quality educational experience for their children.

Thank you

We chose Dikshant International School because of its commitment to excellence in education and the holistic development of its students. The school not only focuses on academics but also provides a vibrant platform for students to showcase their talents and skills.

The school hosts various events throughout the year, making it an exciting and enriching experience for students. Events like TEDx offer students an opportunity to learn from inspirational speakers and gain exposure to innovative ideas. The Inter-House Competitions foster teamwork, leadership, and healthy competition among students.

The Annual Function is a grand celebration of talent, culture, and creativity, where students take the stage to perform and shine. Sports Day is another highlight, encouraging physical fitness and the spirit of sportsmanship. The school also celebrates Children’s Day with enthusiasm, ensuring students feel valued and cherished. Additionally, the CCLF (Chandigarh Children's Litrature Festival) children gets an opportunity to interact with speakers , enhances making learning a joyous experience. Class Assembly has helped my daughter to gain confidence , team work , leadership

With such a dynamic environment, Dikshant International School ensures that students grow academically, socially, and emotionally. The rich variety of events keeps the school vibrant and helps students develop a well-rounded personality, preparing them for future success.

Dikshant International School, Panchkula, is a great place for learning and growth. The teachers are kind, supportive, and always ready to help students do their best. The school provides many opportunities in studies, sports, and extracurricular activities, helping students explore their talents. With a friendly environment and focus on personal growth, it’s the perfect place for children to learn and succeed. Highly recommended for quality education.

This school has given my child the perfect balance of academic learning and personal growth. The school’s supportive environment and focus on overall development made it an easy choice to continue my child’s education here.

My children have been the part of the school for past three years, and honestly, those years were packed with growth of my children in all aspects of life. Not only academics, there has been immense promotion of reading and building public speaking skills. All the teachers provide healthy and friendly environment for kids which is the foundation of happy schooling. Wholeheartedly thanks to Dikshant team!

I have enrolled my son in class 3 last year and my experience has been great ! The teachers and staff helped my kid to adjust well and supported him at every step. This school maintain a perfect balance of academic and co curricular activities without over burdening them . Hats off to teachers, cordinators , especially Ms Shivangi mam who made sure that students understand the basic essence of subjects without pressurising them . A lot of focus is being put on reading and communication skills and they help kids to overcome stage fear. This school provide a platform for overall development of the children under motherly and friendly environment. My son loves going to school, and that says it all !!
